settings.title: Unbox & Set Up
settings.description: Follow the included quick-start guide to set up your product correctly for optimal results.

settings.title: Use Consistently
settings.description: Start with short sessions and gradually increase. Consistency is key to building lasting comfort habits.

settings.title: Feel the Difference
settings.description: Most customers notice improved comfort within the first week of regular use.

settings.question: How long should I use this product each day?
settings.answer: Start with 15-30 minutes and gradually increase as comfort allows. Listen to your body and follow the included guide.

settings.question: What size should I choose?
settings.answer: Check the sizing guide above. If you're between sizes, we recommend sizing up for comfort.

settings.question: Is this a medical device?
settings.answer: No. This is a wellness product designed to support comfort and daily habits. Consult your doctor for medical conditions.

settings.question: What if I'm not satisfied?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. Contact us for a full refund, no questions asked.
